title: İstanbul Okan University
content:
Intech-Cub Incubation Center

MENU

Innovative Technology Incubation Center (Intech-Cub) operates within Istanbul Okan University. It serves entrepreneurs at every stage, from entrepreneurs with technology-oriented business ideas to startups that want to scale up, especially Istanbul Okan University academics and students.

Intech-Cub offers training, mentorship and infrastructure opportunities for these ideas to turn into products with commercial potential.

Opportunities provided by Intech-Cub Incubation Center:

Value proposition and business model development trainings

Preparing a business plan

Infrastructure for prototype development

Academic and sectoral mentoring

Office facilities

Marketing and legal advice

Information on intellectual and industrial property rights

It provides investor meetings.

If you have an innovative idea, you can submit the

Invention Notification Form

and make an appointment for a meeting. Okan Incubation Center will provide the necessary environment and know-how to support you in patenting, developing and marketing your idea with a confidentiality and cooperation agreement.
